resolution_evidence: Status agreement was 24/30. Repeated include-1 versus include-2 criterion disagreements occurred for C0147, C0168, and C0172, establishing systematic ambiguity in generator or serialization precedence versus course-interface contributions. Status disagreements also affected C0015, C0136, C0140, C0145, C0183, and C0198. The calibration therefore requires a substantive protocol clarification and fresh blind rerating before any main release.
